**Saturday, August 15th, 2015**

Senator Paul just wrapped up a successful three day tour of New Hampshire, in which he made stops in nine cities. The overflowing crowds reflected the surging enthusiasm for Rand Paul's liberty-oriented message. Thank you to everyone who attended! Check our [calendar](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29755116:28532175099:m:1:879035888:DBBF1833C5FD02DA0A5B083AF015CFBC:r) to RSVP for future events.

On Thursday, we launched [Students for Rand](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29755116:28532175099:m:1:879035888:DBBF1833C5FD02DA0A5B083AF015CFBC:r) to recruit, organize, and mobilize young people to elect Senator Rand Paul as the next President of the United States. Our mission is to build a youth army and establish an SFR chapter on 300 college campuses in 30 days. More information is available at [randpaul.com/students](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29755116:28532175099:m:1:879035888:DBBF1833C5FD02DA0A5B083AF015CFBC:r). Stay tuned for more updates in next week's newsletter.

Doug Stafford
Chief Strategist
Rand Paul for President

## News of the Week
---
| | |
### Op-Ed: The Party of Tomorrow
I believe the path forward for our country -- and the Republican Party -- is rooted in respecting the Constitution and acknowledging the dignity of the individual. If the Republicans want to be the party of tomorrow, they need ideas that excite young people. Only a candidate who is a socially tolerant, fiscally responsible and principled leader can reinvigorate the Republican brand.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29755117:28532175099:m:1:879035888:DBBF1833C5FD02DA0A5B083AF015CFBC:r)
---
|
### Op-Ed: Don't Fall for a Fake Conservative
I ran for office because I was tired of being misled by Republicans who promised conservative government and gave us bank bailouts and more debt. The Wall Street bankers got richer and the American taxpayers got poorer. The Tea Party erupted over dissatisfaction with false conservatives. It amazes me that anyone in the Tea Party movement could possibly consider Clinton/Reid/Pelosi supporter Donald Trump for President.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29755118:28532175099:m:1:879035888:DBBF1833C5FD02DA0A5B083AF015CFBC:r)
---
|
### Senator Paul Issues a Statement on Hillary Clinton
Hillary Clinton proves time and again that she believes she's above the law. She should have followed laws barring her from using a private email and she should have turned over the server a long time ago. Can Hillary be trusted when it's one investigation after another? I think not.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29755119:28532175099:m:1:879035888:DBBF1833C5FD02DA0A5B083AF015CFBC:r)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Bad history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,
Today history was made in Havana, but we
should not be celebrating. Make no mistake, Peter, Cuba is
still led by an anti-American regime. But, in the eyes of Barack
Obama and Hillary Clinton, the Cuban people are suffering because
not enough American tourists visit the country, when the truth is
the Cuban people are suffering because they live in a tyrannical
dictatorship.
President Obama has rewarded the Castro
regime for its repressive tactics and persistent, patient
opposition to American interests. He has unilaterally decided to
enrich the Castro regime at the expense of the Cuban people.
The concessions to the Castro regime threaten
America's moral standing in our hemisphere and around the world,
brings legitimacy to a state sponsor of terror, and further
empowers an ally of China and Russia that sits just 90 miles from
our shore.
Whitney, when I am elected the next
President of the United States, I will stand with the Cuban
people not their oppressors. I will work to make our nation a
safer place for Americans and our globe safer for our allies. I
know that my dissenting voice today will not go over well with
President Obama, John Kerry and Hillary Clinton. They and their
liberal allies will attack me across the media and airwaves,
which is why I need your immediate help.
If you stand with me in agreeing that
today's ceremony was nothing more than a propaganda rally for the
Castro regime, then please follow this link right now.
The Embassy opening in Havana is
unfortunately just the beginning. President Obama is also trying
to push through the Iranian deal that will eventually lead to a
nuclear Iran, and an even more threatened Israel. These deals
demonstrate with jarring clarity how the Obama Administration has
failed to anticipate impending crises, ignored the realities of
the globalized economy, and sought to make America liked rather
than respected.
Centuries of global affairs tell us the
best way to affect an outcome with volatile leaders is through
strength and example, while the worst is through weakness and
concession. When elected, I will lead our nation with strength,
but I need your help right now to ensure I get there.
Please follow this link right now to show
your support.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43430908:18663035477:m:3:1349778030:80C649E54FC39734E61826624B970DC3:r
Whitney, I need to know if you stand with
me. The Obama White House and the Democrats are going to try to
silence my dissenting voice, and I need your help to ensure my
voice stays front and center.
Sincerely,
Marco Rubio
P.S. While President Obama would love for
everyone to praise his deal with the Castros, we most certainly
should not be. As President, I will stand with the Cuban people
and not their oppressors. Please show your support by standing
with me right now.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43430908:18663035477:m:3:1349778030:80C649E54FC39734E61826624B970DC3:r

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Petition: Protect Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Good Morning,

I've spent the past few months traveling all across Florida. There's one common theme I hear in every community I visit: _**Protect Social Security.**_

Republicans continue to attack Social Security. Their presidential candidates want to raise the retirement age. Their leaders in Congress set up a funding crisis for the program.

They call those "reforms." I call it breaking a promise to our seniors.

[_**Social Security turns 80 this year. I want to use this occasion to redouble our efforts to protect the program.**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2034/738133e4/3adb3c7c/7f94867d/213575077/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e150815b") **[ Sign your name to stand with me to protect Social Security. >> ](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2034/738133e4/3adb3c7c/7f94867d/213575077/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e150815b")** For 80 years, Social Security has protected American seniors from falling into poverty. Ninety percent of people 65 or older get some of their family income from Social Security.

In Florida, Social Security lifts 1.2 million seniors out of poverty -- the second highest in the nation. Without Social Security benefits, an estimated 44% of elderly Americans nationwide would have incomes below the poverty line.

Seniors I've spoken to rely on Social Security every day. They're worried that if their benefits get cut, they'll have to choose between meals and medicines.

I have always fought to protect Social Security -- and that's exactly what I plan to do in the Senate. Thank you.

clean_body: | Good Morning, I've spent the past few months traveling all across Florida. There's one common theme I hear in every community I visit: Protect Social Security. Republicans continue to attack Social Security. Their presidential candidates want to raise the retirement age. Their leaders in Congress set up a funding crisis for the program. They call those "reforms." I call it breaking a promise to our seniors. "" "" For 80 years, Social Security has protected American seniors from falling into poverty. Ninety percent of people 65 or older get some of their family income from Social Security. In Florida, Social Security lifts 1.2 million seniors out of poverty -- the second highest in the nation. Without Social Security benefits, an estimated 44% of elderly Americans nationwide would have incomes below the poverty line. Seniors I've spoken to rely on Social Security every day. body:
Courageous Conservatives - Reigniting the Promise of America
**Hello Friend,**
Because of you, it's been another amazing week! We just wrapped up our #CruzCountry #CruzToVictory Bus Tour through seven southern states that will play a huge role in making Ted our Republican nominee for President in 2016:
[](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjzvrC1QAi42mZt4-2BIXxR5Tc35l8XsbDSMYZDcmZj2B2yETmK2-2B7eF5iC3R7nUhthco-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCHZOKZzp9TRcDy5jvp-2Bk21Kq297WMV62UkZlh3Axu4MypV-2BhVfVfxn-2FoiYcj6A-2FC06kDm0lYePkSkfkKp2cbC9G6lPia3B57ep4R5OJB5b4nQiBEwkr8G60O9BISW-2BXh6GVuvJw6-2FStt5AaPbkwGev2o-2BIr09efsTHseU603gveupAgSz-2F3MVqpgRgrtpGw5j0V56507Ar2wjJFqdMsdEIGVij03Z6KgACJoPDKGP9MHhW2HE5MQeEGxX31rkEGAiFaablZ529COVyK8kQYJ39gW1QwWB6jLzjoPgdI6HCY53K6IEgI7-2BTvUT2c2z6ZZcMl-2BLWS7ywo-2FzJOMdGcbFTjvjL5g2I-2F8SCLd9iR9ytSoBuQ5Zc8uLfhAYy5ODv0pws-3D)
Coming off of the recent Republican Presidential debate, the wind was at our backs. A recent NBC poll ran after the debate and released Sunday morning showed that Ted had jumped up to second place nationally:
But even I'll admit, we were a little surprised at the receptions we received throughout the tour. From the debate stage in Ohio to South Carolina, Georgia, Alabama, Tennessee, Mississippi, Arkansas, and Oklahoma, at stop after stop, _we had to move our events from inside to outside in fields and parking lots to accommodate the crowds_ of courageous conservatives that turned out to support Ted. [Your showing of support was absolutely breathtaking](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjzvrC1QAi42mZt4-2BIXxR5TcpowNE062MaRNycYItZalRdLKAYFK0LUucTh0kj1Vd5k-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCHZOKZzp9TRcDy5jvp-2Bk21K5l-2FSrakiBsbxqPErf2-2FR-2B4by8Mde5jeowrAFHUjb-2FKMnwXVIQv83NoFc27N6y4T3ZPF88Dd4bhZip9mEewco2D-2F3BvlxzpH0ahVM97gwA4-2BlpT-2BGfrJYU4CGGVUYToJzxqcdcPyXEMmMx4DEFzqBWXH9Dv6x6mGKEWJw2CHd65HG6gMpHKXNLotmSoYvyYHbkzu6ww-2Biz1Y4tfWwgh0AUhi4UqFXxiP6WaRvddJwzzrLKRWbpyu3OkQnYkyaMH939meuHq165V-2BTFOw-2BWNsOt187jHA-2BWihc5G-2BboYhG-2FbcefHHqBo3A4eISSEvUBIPqNIQmnTtt43BVmdQYlOKQTjoBU6kgJAQe-2BtW4dh6RUX4-3D) \-- **thank you:**
[](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyx-2FfYGqyCM1A1cRZnLoHNvB0fq9HC8X-2B2mnqwUUrxQm7aXp2YNDsKD6k9ChMaWTSPQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCHZOKZzp9TRcDy5jvp-2Bk21KxaN4osGXY9UfUiBzD1RnCq2DJW9hffG9HfCjSWP-2BL6gkM0NbNgu73lUZjuD4DcmSwPGYN5RE5zvKHgc-2B-2B9VdnGuan7TOUFllrYgoZ82KuYsiUkwtAfuh-2FxCFuHTeiOuIaD-2FOdZXnyYnwfEIXbr3K8dClVHOHajmzA0YF87T-2FLAXY6X03Rhhfvy2rs-2FzwjQ9vVgYGRdjzI-2FDddE8HoEzcQ3NFjp32zpm-2F0k-2FrzIWCBMH7JD-2FIPOBJmBP7WFD4VkD5nd36HCdHZyz4yOK1NpsypBJzC6lrJbZXUquZSBkt1l-2FLvre8HcddFL-2BC1xxMKloZpkXyzuxMEazr0y4H2j6fSNnO7Y5ruP-2BMq6lpxkNFIWU-3D)
The tour started in Mount Pleasant, South Carolina, on Friday, August 7th and concluded on Thursday evening in Tulsa, Oklahoma, where the atmosphere was [absolutely electric](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyx-2FfYGqyCM1A1cRZnLoHNvB1qv8DjkVwfdGRj3Z5-2Fj-2F3ssvK1zOwyRsYiwXvEOKCFA-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCHZOKZzp9TRcDy5jvp-2Bk21Kcj-2FbwB-2FHUt-2FnxZ4k9kEK6AmY33MEZUGr4NkuYpbbiYPPk-2FfNebKD7Z7EUECJQqeFUM5Zs6EFgeN9GJrD3aVEEQ7OHCdygtd-2BrEZNnmzWd5-2FRyCano35ovAauqkljDl7RET27qj94YWBcNuVgQphc6bbBk4vuIUOm55I7ZGI8TXd8wWtP-2BYUIV73VKKN2oFeDVfmAa8QleWJ90FaXTW7Re9dpwfxYSYz6oWrJPXoyzghSimbGXTku8cQJ2mAZS3QBzcqHnk7lgLstbzu1ZvAKyDalQO9-2BO6f5p8kLRnaVyx4RajErzA64rxuvNcEJn2-2FvQBscvJ-2FlIvlLk3yXa7V-2FQ1j7xtw0q72g-2FPqv9ehbXcI-3D). And the results were clear -- the southern states that account for 356 of the 1,236 delegates needed to clinch the Republican nomination for President -- the so-called "SEC" Primary states, are #CruzCountry. We look forward to continuing to build on our strong presence there to ensure we compete and win in the South!
One of the stops turned unusually personally along the way -- I wanted to [share the story with you](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=TEeb5-2FMuQyoelyZpsAGcFB24i1xSUKFOJvcm2CKywmN1XJUydb1OglqXj7EdAUDukXagIqvNQDIEUUNUNWxTrC44hHD8-2F0kV0DJ98TkWwc70PNJOXF0PW3IEWf0iBD4C_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCHZOKZzp9TRcDy5jvp-2Bk21KRjAX5dbHx0XoVWdvvIScJHR3nwSooPgdnyWaSmb83NJDpJfKRwyxWWr6h604YkUHurvO20p4BBZvyfbevBRnQ4qJhjD0AfTD19KojoWzNCLanHiX0nvkt7xX32qdbIrbMp0o52snxGRM57Diy68po9fYataQRXUaMBZgEPqkaI5ufMJv1ALwK9lwD5x0PlhLDKh0j-2FT-2BzBTkK1gFyR-2F3r4mVmcwVLzYrQVFH8-2B3AE216xxMANF9ZqvDO-2FYVT4-2BvxIO5FMUdMRSpyysgJBwQzgle2O8I3J6VdE6ytKotB1XUVOdLTN2I7-2FkJl7AOBpopJZ7fN3oVoXztnwW4xm3aGLUG4VHmVGR3C7JZ5SIGO9-2Bs-3D). In Murfreesboro, Tennessee earlier this week, we had an unexpected and special guest -- Pastor Gaylon Wiley. Many years ago, Pastor Wiley help lead Ted's father, Rafael, to Jesus and baptized Ted when he was just eight years old. They hadn't seen each other in years, and it was truly touching to witness the two of them reuniting. [You can read about it here](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=TEeb5-2FMuQyoelyZpsAGcFB24i1xSUKFOJvcm2CKywmN1XJUydb1OglqXj7EdAUDukXagIqvNQDIEUUNUNWxTrC44hHD8-2F0kV0DJ98TkWwc70PNJOXF0PW3IEWf0iBD4C_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCHZOKZzp9TRcDy5jvp-2Bk21KlFT-2FBKnMcxqf0lOdA5C9AxS0t5rHgXSBP50xYYHEmoQxNJOL-2FF45LYEhSNaddL1beryeb3DAeJO8GQA0lziivxbv6p-2FMchmu0XWa40k-2FeKKdKs-2FJPwPgNhhD5wlcfoT67cd0ZcGDwmyvbS8zmgKpfDQFdhviVUMFJv-2Fi7P6MFU7S2sENO7zRkHPYR1pVZOgpJQ8HLo2RyujmihWOaC7wffGlGzM9XmxD0RNfhAiTsaAucUTnUKw7J3bwVrrn6b3vlcV11IMFRXFN0qFoE3xeB-2Fzv43wLbwvqTSohE-2FUuhuXk9ozeGIt6bcYt9NIHII-2FMkdMXb0LE5R-2Bg6VCZMNe-2F0pJ1wDGtxhENqm20lGxuTig-3D).

clean_body: Courageous Conservatives - Reigniting the Promise of America Hello Friend, Because of you, it's been another amazing week! We just wrapped up our #CruzCountry #CruzToVictory Bus Tour through seven southern states that will play a huge role in making Ted our Republican nominee for President in 2016: Coming off of the recent Republican Presidential debate, the wind was at our backs. A recent NBC poll ran after the debate and released Sunday morning showed that Ted had jumped up to second place nationally: But even I'll admit, we were a little surprised at the receptions we received throughout the tour. From the debate stage in Ohio to South Carolina, Georgia, Alabama, Tennessee, Mississippi, Arkansas, and Oklahoma, at stop after stop, we had to move our events from inside to outside in fields and parking lots to accommodate the crowds of courageous conservatives that turned out to support Ted. \-- thank you: The tour started in Mount Pleasant, South Carolina, on Friday, August 7th and concluded on Thursday evening in Tulsa, Oklahoma, where the atmosphere was . And the results were clear -- the southern states that account for 356 of the 1,236 delegates needed to clinch the Republican nomination for President -- the so-called "SEC" Primary states, are #CruzCountry. We look forward to continuing to build on our strong presence there to ensure we compete and win in the South! One of the stops turned unusually personally along the way -- I wanted to . In Murfreesboro, Tennessee earlier this week, we had an unexpected and special guest -- Pastor Gaylon Wiley. Many years ago, Pastor Wiley help lead Ted's father, Rafael, to Jesus and baptized Ted when he was just eight years old. They hadn't seen each other in years, and it was truly touching to witness the two of them reuniting. . As a reminder, we are less than one week away from our that will have special appearances from the Newsboys as well as the Bontrager Family Singers. You won't want to miss it -- to join us!
